text:
On Tue, Dec 19, 2000 at 09:42:27AM -0800, stevedav@pacbell.net wrote:
> 
> >Number:         23646
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       Staroffice 5.2 fails to install on FreeBSD 4.1.1-RELEASE
>
*snip*
> 
> glibc version: 2.1.2
> /usr/ports/editors/staroffice52/work/tmp/sv001.tmp/setup.bin: error in loading shared libraries: libvos1GCC.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory
> *** Error code 1 (ignored)
> 
> An error occured during StarOffice5.2 install. Please send a mail with debug-output and
> some information about your FreeBSD-environment to mb@imp.ch. Thanks.
> 

And have you sent the above email to the maintainer?
